description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish handbag from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsBrown and blue bagGathered panel with semi-circular patch and buckle detail in frontOne main zippered compartmentInner separator and synthetic lining with zippered pocketsOne zippered pocket at backA short handle with zipper trim for carrying easeGrey suede finish floral trim hanging at the sideMaterial and CareSynthetic, fabricWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 32 cmWidth: 40 cmDepth: 11 cm Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish handbag from Baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come.
